content.problemStatement:
You are given an array AAA of size NNN – [A1,A2,…,AN][A_1, A_2, \ldots, A_N][A1​,A2​,…,AN​].

There will be B1+B2+…+BNB_1 + B_2 + \ldots + B_NB1​+B2​+…+BN​ total events, with exactly BiB_iBi​ events of type iii. The type iii events will happen before the type i+1i + 1i+1 events for each 1≤i<N1 \le i \lt N1≤i<N.

In an event of type XXX, you must do **exactly one** of the following:


Add 111 to AXA_XAX​, or
Add 222 to AYA_YAY​ for any Y≠XY \ne XY=X.
Note that the choice is made independently for each event: in particular, you can make different choices even for different events of the same type.

After all the events are done, you want to minimize max⁡(A1,A2,…,AN)\max(A_1, A_2, \ldots, A_N)max(A1​,A2​,…,AN​). Find this minima value.


Input Format

The first line of input will contain a single integer TTT, denoting the number of test cases.
Each test case consists of three lines of input.

The first line of each test case contains a single integer NNN - the size of the array.
The second line contains NNN integers - A1,A2,…,ANA_1, A_2, \ldots, A_NA1​,A2​,…,AN​.
The third line contains NNN integers - B1,B2,…,BNB_1, B_2, \ldots, B_NB1​,B2​,…,BN​.




Output Format
For each test case, output on a new line the minimum value of max⁡(A1,A2,…,AN)\max(A_1, A_2, \ldots, A_N)max(A1​,A2​,…,AN​) after all events.
constraints: The sum of NNN over all test cases does not exceed 2⋅1052 \cdot 10^52⋅105.

sampleTestCases.explanation:
Explanation:
Test case 1 : There are 333 total events, 111 of type 111 and 222 of type 222. Here is what an optimal procedure looks like:

Event 111 of type 111 : We choose the first option to add to X=1X = 1X=1 itself. The array is updated to [4,5][4, 5][4,5].
Event 222 of type 222 : We choose the first option to add to X=2X = 2X=2 itself. The array is updated to [4,6][4, 6][4,6].
Event 333 of type 222 : We choose the second option to add to some other YYY, and we choose Y=1Y = 1Y=1. The array is updated to [6,6][6, 6][6,6].

We achieved a maxima of 666 which is the smallest we can do.
